title: elaphoglossum queenslandicum
intro: Elaphoglossum queenslandicum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Australia, particularly in the states of Queensland and New South Wales. Elaphoglossum queenslandicum has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to prepare herbal remedies that are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and supporting immune function, often in the form of tea or tincture.
